testcase.name: test_special_ingredient_current_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bug_fixes_v2.py:142: in test_special_ingredient_current_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Special ingredient API failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Special ingredient API failed: {"detail":"can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
